description: SafeChat-AUD brief, low-risk coping strategies for Stage 3 and LLM selected_strategy_ids. Not medical advice.
usage: Each item has strategy_id; the model may output 0–2 ids when relevant. assistant_text stays one question, short.

strategies.name: Delay the first drink
suitable_for: Automatic pour at a usual time
not_for: Unsupervised abrupt cessation when clinically unsafe
strategies.example_if_then_format: If I want a drink at 8pm, I'll leave the bottle in the kitchen and shower for 10 minutes first.

strategies.name: One alcoholic drink, one water
suitable_for: Parties or dinners where you want to slow pace
not_for: If water does not slow intake and risk escalates
strategies.example_if_then_format: If someone pushes a drink, I'll drink half a glass of water before each sip of alcohol.

strategies.name: Text a support person
not_for: No safe contact or contact worsens conflict
strategies.example_if_then_format: If I crave a drink after work, I'll text ___ 'rough day—two minutes?' and wait 10 minutes before deciding.

strategies.name: 15-minute substitute activity
suitable_for: Short urges that ease with distraction
not_for: Suicidal ideation or crisis—use emergency resources
strategies.example_if_then_format: If I head to the fridge for alcohol, I'll walk outside for 15 minutes or listen to one podcast episode first.

strategies.name: Non-alcoholic substitute
suitable_for: Need a glass in hand at social events
not_for: Allergy or strong aversion to substitutes
strategies.example_if_then_format: If a client toasts, I'll order a non-alcoholic beer or soda and use a brief excuse.

strategies.name: Leave the setting earlier
suitable_for: Risk rises after a certain round
not_for: Cannot leave and needs a different plan
strategies.example_if_then_format: If round two starts to hit hard, I'll leave by 9pm using 'early meeting tomorrow.'

strategies.name: Keep alcohol out of sight
suitable_for: Home drinking habit with strong visual cues
strategies.example_if_then_format: If I sit on the couch after dinner, I'll store bottles in a cabinet and keep only NA drinks visible.

strategies.name: Check-in with a buddy
not_for: Privacy concerns about sharing drinking goals
strategies.example_if_then_format: If it's a risky Friday, I'll text ___ 'green/yellow/red' at 8pm before ordering another round.
